item.title: 0.4.7 beta (build 29)
item.description:
Groovyday 0.4.7 private beta

  • The synthetic 120-BPM preview is now restricted to onboarding and never masks real silence afterward
  • Every visualizer shares one calm idle state with only an eight-percent soft-wind motion floor
  • Paused or stalled audio releases the final beat instead of holding an energetic frame indefinitely
  • Wave breakers, particle travelers, and peak caps now settle cleanly when music stops

This is an opt-in development build for personal testing.
